{{Quote|He is one of our top mechanics. I think Chewbacca makes him nervous.|[[Inaldra/Legends|Inaldra's]] [[Inaldra's Lieutenant|Lieutenant]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:FR" />}}
'''Jolka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he worked at [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]].<ref name="SWG:FR" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] arrived on the station aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. The [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] Chewbacca then requested Jolka to fix the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] R2-D2 that had been damaged during a firefight in an [[Unidentified Imperial space station|Imperial space station]]. Unfortunately, the mechanic was missing a [[Power converter/Legends|power converter]]. As the Wookiee was getting impatient, the Zabrak became very nervous. He therefore tasked the spacer to destroy some malfunctioning droids on the lower level of Tansarii Point Station to get a power converter. The spacer eventually returned with an intact power converter and Jolka was able to fix R2-D2.<ref name="SWG:FR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jolka appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:FR" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Jolka was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
